title: Computer Literacy Training Programs * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Computer Literacy Training Programs * Older Adults 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ACCENT NETWORK BASIC COMPUTER SKILLS CLASSES FOR SENIOR IMMIGRANTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic computer skills lessons for beginners, focusing on Russian and Ukrainian population. Virtual and in-person options are available. 12254 SW Garden Place Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Older adults who are immigrants, refugees, or asylum seekers Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 280-6738 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CYBER-SENIORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technology support and training using an intergenerational, volunteer model. Services include one-on-one tech calls, daily webinars, and additional learning resources. Services are available by phone, virtually, and in person in some communities. Trainers are welcome to volunteer. Website Los Angeles, CA 90048 Eligibility: Trainees: Age 60 and older Volunteer Trainers: Age 14 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm Email (844) 217-3057 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ACCENT NETWORK BASIC COMPUTER SKILLS CLASSES FOR SENIOR IMMIGRANTS
